Buka / Mama Put.description: Local Nigerian restaurant serving traditional meals
Buka / Mama Put.example_tone: This mama put na the best for the area, the egusi soup dey sweet die!

Suya Joint / Street Food.description: Outdoor grilling spots serving suya, roasted meat, and street snacks
Suya Joint / Street Food.example_tone: The suya wey dem sell for this place na top tier, e pepper well well!

Eateries (Mr Biggs-style).description: Fast casual Nigerian restaurant chains and quick service spots
Eateries (Mr Biggs-style).example_tone: The meat pie no reach before, dem don reduce the size sha

Pepper Soup Spot.description: Restaurants and bars specialising in pepper soup, fish, and assorted meats
Pepper Soup Spot.example_tone: The catfish pepper soup hot well well, e enter body!

Beer Parlour.description: Local bars and drinking spots serving alcohol and light food
Beer Parlour.example_tone: The cold beer dey always available, no be small thing

Open Market Stall.description: Market vendors selling fresh produce, ingredients, and household goods
Open Market Stall.example_tone: The price for this market reasonable pass Shoprite, e make sense

Confectionery / Bakery.description: Bakeries and dessert spots selling cakes, bread, and pastries
Confectionery / Bakery.example_tone: The cake wey dem bake na original, e sweet die!

Canteen / Bukateria.description: Office and school canteens serving affordable daily meals
Canteen / Bukateria.example_tone: For this price the food fill body, e better pass outside

Guesthouse / Lodge.description: Budget hotels, guesthouses, and lodges across Nigerian cities
Guesthouse / Lodge.example_tone: The generator no carry light at all, e spoil the whole stay

Beauty / Salon.description: Hair salons, nail salons, and beauty service providers
Beauty / Salon.example_tone: The aunty wey do my hair na wizard, e come out fine!
